result.title: This AI Actually Surprised Me
result.description:
ChatGPT’s new image model did something that blew me away 🤯

Usually, you'd have to download images from the source and drop them into ChatGPT with your prompt so the AI can use them in the output. 

But this new model was able to just grab them from the site using only the URL.

Making flyers, ads, menus, promos, product images, etc. just got A LOT easier, and with a lot less worry that the AI is going to grab random hallucinated images or details from all over the place. 

Have you tried ChatGPT Images 2.0 yet? And did it impress you, or not so much?

#ai #ainews #chatgpt #openai #genai

result.title: The AI Solution Nobody’s Talking About
result.description:
Hot take: AI isn’t hard to use anymore…

Figuring out what to do with it is. That’s where most people get stuck.

Everyone wants you to “automate your workflow with AI” but they don’t tell you HOW. 

@hapaxai is one of the first tools I’ve seen that’s actually made to bridge that implementation gap.

Instead of waiting for you to tell it what to automate, it finds the repetitive parts in your workflow and creates solutions for them. 

Try it for yourself here and use the code HAPAXDEMO for 15 credits FREE: https://askhapax.ai/?utm_source=matt_wolfe

#ad #HapaxAI #AIAgents #productivityhack
